html:
Exclusive to:

The Tinkerer's Tower is a naturally spawning Pig Shop Structure exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is found in the Palace Pig City and sells a variety of Blueprints to the player, as well as various Crafting materials. Blueprints sold in this building are only way to unlock crafting the specific items as they are not available via Alchemy Engine.

If the player obtains the Key to the City, The Tinkerer's Tower also becomes craftable in the City Planning Tab using two Magnifying Glasses and four Pig Skins.

Contents

  • 1 Interior
  • 2 Decor
    • 2.1 Shelfs
    • 2.2 Pillar
    • 2.3 Window
    • 2.4 Doors
  • 3 Trivia
  • 4 Gallery

Interior

Upon entering The Tinkerer's Tower, the player will find a variety of Items that are sold in exchange for Oincs. A Worker Pig shopkeeper works at the desk.

The following items can be found on displays in the center of the shop which will be restocked by the shopkeeper:

Item Name
() Walking Cane Blueprint 500
() Eyebrella Blueprint 300
() Scaled Chest Blueprint 200
() Scalemail Blueprint 200
() Weather Pain Blueprint 100
() Dripple Pipes Blueprint 100
() Insulated Pack Blueprint 100
() Moggles Blueprint 30
() Hibearnation Vest Blueprint 50
() Trawl Net Blueprint 30

Additionally, the following items can be bought from shelves which will not be restocked by the shopkeeper:

Item Name Amount
Papyrus 1 1
Charcoal 1 2
Nitre 1 1

Decor

  • Rollholder
  • Rollholder
  • Filecabinet
  • Chest Open Decor
  • Clock
  • Clock
  • Worktable

Shelfs

  • Floating Shelf

Pillar

  • Basic Wall Corner
  • Basic Wall Front

Window

  • Round Window

Doors

  • Exit

Trivia

  • The Tinkerer's Tower was added in the March 18, 2019 update.

Gallery

  • The interior of a The Tinkerer's Tower.

“I suppose balloon blueprints would be too much too ask.”
–Wheeler

'''The Tinkerer's Tower''' is a naturally spawning [[Pig Shops|Pig Shop]] [[Structures|Structure]] exclusive to the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC. It is found in the [[Pig City|Palace Pig City]] and sells a variety of [[Blueprint]]s to the player, as well as various [[Crafting]] materials. Blueprints sold in this building are only way to unlock crafting the specific items as they are not available via [[Alchemy Engine]].

If the player obtains the [[Key to the City]], The Tinkerer's Tower also becomes craftable in the [[City Planning Tab]] using two [[Magnifying Glass]]es and four [[Pig Skin]]s.

==[[File:Door (Ancient Pig Ruins Exit) Map Icon.png|32px]] Interior==
Upon entering The Tinkerer's Tower, the player will find a variety of [[Items]] that are sold in exchange for [[Oinc]]s. A [[Worker Pig]] shopkeeper works at the desk.

The following items can be found on displays in the center of the shop which will be restocked by the shopkeeper:
